description.unified: Leaps and deals Physical Damage to enemies within range, stunning them for [2sec->1 sec].
Deals Physical Damage to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their [Physical Defense by 30%->ATK by 24%] and Attack Speed by [18%->65%] for 4 sec.
For [17 sec->7 sec], increases all allies' Physical Defense by 98(1+0.3Skill Level), Physical Block Chance by [140->200], and reduces Physical Damage taken by [11%->35%].
On block, deals Physical Damage in front and reduces the target's Attack by [4%->10%] for [6sec->5 sec]. After using the skill, your Defense increases by [6%->5%], stacking up to [4->5] times.

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [2 sec->1 sec].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2000->1000], but pulls nearby enemies toward the target.

light.unified: [(added) Increases Physical Damage taken by the target by 30% for 4 sec -> (removed) On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec].

dark.unified: [(added) On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec -> (removed) After knockback, stuns the target for 1 sec].

light.unified: [(added) Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 4 sec -> (removed) Increases P.DEF Boost by 40%].

dark.unified: [(added) Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by 400 -> (removed) Physical Block Chance additionally increases by 110].

light.unified: On block, the Attack reduction effect is changed to [(added) apply 2 stacks -> (removed) stack up to 6 times, also removes Physical Defense increase stack change].

dark.unified: [(added) Every 10 sec, when an ally other than yourself is hit, all allies' Physical Critical Resistance is increased by 300 for 5 sec -> (removed) Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec].

description.unified: [Cut Ground] reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by [1 sec->2 sec].
[Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by [25%->30%] and their P.Crit Resist by {0} for 4 sec.
[Guardian Shield] [(removed) Removes negative effects from self and] increases [effect duration by 4.5 sec and boosts] DEF [boost->increase] by {0}%.
[Vow of Knights] recovers [ {0}%->6%] of Max HP and increases the duration of own P.DEF by [3->{0}] sec.

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' Max HP by [4%->10%]. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Every 3 skills used, increases [the 4allies with the lowest P.DEF->all allies'] Physical Defense by {0}% and [ATK->Attack] by {1}% for 15 sec. [ (added) The Physical Defense increase is applied at 2 times its value to the 4 allies with the lowest Physical Defense.]
